name: Phoenix-MD
description: A Simple But Advanced WhatsApp Bot

SESSION_ID.description: Enter Your Session ID Which You Received From The Pairing Code

MODE.description: Enter Bot Work Mode (public or private)

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Enter Your Heroku App Name Same As Above You Entered

HEROKU_API_KEY.description: Enter Your Heroku Account Api Key. Get It From https://dashboard.heroku.com/account

BOT_LANG.description: Enter Your Bot Language (e.g., EN, ML)

STICKER_DATA.description: Enter Sticker Packname And Author (Format: Pack;Author)

ALIVE_DATA.description: Enter Your Custom Alive Message And Image URL
ALIVE_DATA.value:
рҹ‘Ӣ КңбҙҮКҸ &sender, ЙӘ бҙҚ *бҙҳКңбҙҸбҙҮЙҙЙӘx-бҙҚбҙ… бҙЎКңбҙҖбҙӣкңұбҙҖбҙҳбҙҳ КҷбҙҸбҙӣ* бҙҖКҹЙӘбҙ бҙҮ ЙҙбҙҸбҙЎ!

рҹ“Ң бҙӣКҸбҙҳбҙҮ *menu* бҙӣбҙҸ ЙўбҙҮбҙӣ бҙҚКҸ бҙ„бҙҸбҙҚбҙҚбҙҖЙҙбҙ… КҹЙӘкңұбҙӣ.

*бҙҳКҹбҙҖбҙӣкң°бҙҸКҖбҙҚ:* &platform
*КҖбҙңЙҙбҙӣЙӘбҙҚбҙҮ:* &runtime;https://i.ibb.co/tHWJrz3/IMG-20231128-WA0005.jpg

WELCOME_MSG.description: Enter Your Group Welcome Message (Use @user, @gname tags)
WELCOME_MSG.value:
рҹ‘Ӣ Hello *@user* Welcome To Our Group *@gname*
*Total Members:* @count
*Total Admins:* @admin
*Group Description:*
@gdesc @pp

GOODBYE_MSG.description: Enter Your Group Goodbye Message (Use @user, @gname tags)

START_MSG.description: Enter true To Enable Start Message Or false To Disable

ERROR_MSG.description: Enter true To Enable Error Messages Or false To Disable

AUTO_ALWAYS_ONLINE.description: Enter true To Stay Always Online Or false To Disable

AUTO_CALL_REJECT.description: Enter true To Automatically Reject Calls Or false To Disable

AUTO_CALL_REJECT_MSG.description: Enter Your Custom Call Reject Message
AUTO_CALL_REJECT_MSG.value:
*бҙҖбҙңбҙӣбҙҸбҙҚбҙҖбҙӣбҙҮбҙ… бҙ„бҙҖКҹКҹ КҷКҹбҙҸбҙ„бҙӢЙӘЙҙЙў*

кңұбҙҸКҖКҖКҸ бҙ„бҙҖКҹКҹкңұ бҙҖКҖбҙҮ ЙҙбҙҸбҙӣ бҙҖКҹКҹбҙҸбҙЎбҙҮбҙ…

бҙҳКҹбҙҮбҙҖкңұбҙҮ кңұбҙҮЙҙбҙ… бҙҖ бҙӣбҙҮxбҙӣ бҙҚбҙҮкңұкңұбҙҖЙўбҙҮ/бҙ бҙҸЙӘбҙ„бҙҮ бҙҚбҙҮкңұкңұбҙҖЙўбҙҮ

> бҙҳКңбҙҸбҙҮЙҙЙӘx-бҙҚбҙ… бҙЎКңбҙҖбҙӣкңұбҙҖбҙҳбҙҳ КҷбҙҸбҙӣ

AUTO_MSG_READ.description: Enter true To Auto Read Received Messages Or false To Disable

AUTO_MSG_REACT.description: Enter true To Automatically React To Messages Or false To Disable

AUTO_STATUS_VIEW.description: Enter true To Auto View Contact Statuses Or false To Disable
